description_long: This is a vintage-style motor scooter with a metallic blue-gray body and a classic, rounded design reminiscent of mid-20th-century European scooters. The scooter features a single, black cushioned seat with visible wear, a prominent headlight mounted on the front handlebar, and two large white-walled tires with red inner rims. The side panels are smooth and slightly bulbous, with a '200' marking on the rear side, suggesting the engine capacity. The handlebars are straight with rounded grips, and the rear section includes a small taillight and a subtle rear rack. The overall appearance is utilitarian yet stylish, with a slightly weathered finish indicating regular use.
description: A vintage metallic blue-gray scooter with a single black seat, white-walled tires, and a classic rounded body, featuring a front headlight and '200' marking on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the '200' marking, black seat, and both white-walled tires with red rims.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the seat, taillight, and the width of the rear bodywork.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0 but from the other side, with the headlight and handlebar profile visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the headlight, handlebar, and the front fender, with the brand text visible on the front panel.
attribute_deck_design: elongated, slightly curved, wide enough for both feet, smooth metallic surface with no visible patterns
attribute_brand_logo: White script text 'Lambretta' on the front panel
